module.name: Demo Guestbook
module.author: PythonAppFoundry
module.description: A demo module showcasing forms, data collection with DynamicModel, and basic rendering. Import this from the Modules page to see PythonAppFoundry in action immediately at your site root.

scripts.script:
entries = DynamicModel.get_or_create('demo_entries', { 'name': db.String(100), 'email': db.String(100), 'message': db.Text, 'created_at': db.DateTime, }) if request.method == 'POST': entry = entries( name=request.form.get('name', ''), email=request.form.get('email', ''), message=request.form.get('message', ''), created_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc), ) db.session.add(entry) db.session.commit() flash('Thanks for your message!') return redirect('/') all_entries = entries.query.order_by(entries.created_at.desc()).limit(20).all() html = '

Welcome to PythonAppFoundry!

' html += '

This demo shows off forms, data collection via DynamicModel, and rendering. Try leaving a message below.

' html += '

Leave a Message

' html += render_form(action='/') if all_entries: html += '

Recent Messages

' html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '' for e in all_entries: html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '' html += '
NameEmailMessageDate
' + str(e.name) + '' + str(e.email) + '' + str(e.message) + '' + (e.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') if e.created_at else '') + '
' else: html += '

No messages yet. Be the first!

' html += '
' html += '

PythonAppFoundry Demo Module v1.0.0

' _result = render(html)
